ticket_recommendations.title: Align bootstrap-first routing with the planning and write-lease contract
ticket_recommendations.summary: Make failed bootstrap the sole legal next action and remove the planning-artifact versus write-lock deadlock for non-Wave-0 tickets.

ticket_recommendations.title: Regenerate restart surfaces from canonical state and block overclaiming repaired status
ticket_recommendations.summary: Update START-HERE, context snapshot, and handoff publication so bootstrap and lease drift cannot be published as ready state.

ticket_recommendations.title: Add repeat-cycle and coordinator-ownership regressions to the Scafforge package
ticket_recommendations.summary: Teach audit and prompt surfaces to flag post-repair persistence, restart-surface overclaim, and coordinator-authored specialist artifacts.

ticket_recommendations.title: Refresh GPTTalker managed workflow surfaces after package changes land
ticket_recommendations.summary: Run repo-local managed-surface repair only after the required Scafforge package changes are available.

ticket_recommendations.title: Resume existing Wave 10 source remediation after workflow repair is verified
ticket_recommendations.summary: Keep using EXEC-007 through EXEC-011; do not create duplicate source tickets before the workflow layer is repaired.
